description: Derive the auth signing keypair from L0 master key bytes. Captured TS bytes; Rust currently diverges (uses HKDF-SHA256 instead of unkeyed BLAKE2b on context||L0). See deviations.md.

serverBoundOutputs.name: authPublicKey
serverBoundOutputs.reason: Auth public key is registered with the server.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: l0MasterKey
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: L0 master key must never reach the server.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: authSigningSeed
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: Auth signing seed is the secret half of the auth keypair.
